title: NIMHANS Outreach and Training Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS)
short_info: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 1 Outreach and Training Coordinator posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

qualification.education_qualification: First class Masters in Public health/ Rural Development /Economics/Human Resource/Social Work/Psychology or equivalent.
qualification.details: First class Masters in Public health/ Rural Development /Economics/Human Resource/Social Work/Psychology or equivalent.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIMHANS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Outreach and Training Coordinator post is scheduled for 09 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Outreach and Training Coordinator position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class Masters degree in Public Health, Rural Development, Economics, Human Resource, Social Work, Psychology, or an equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Outreach and Training Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Outreach and Training Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Outreach and Training Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Outreach and Training Coordinator position at NIMHANS.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this NIMHANS recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Outreach and Training Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in-cum-Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for NIMHANS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at NIMHANS, Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560029.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).
